description_long: This awning features a robust wooden frame with a series of parallel beams extending outward from a solid concrete wall. The structure is supported at the front by two vertical wooden posts, while the rear is anchored directly into the wall, providing stability. The top consists of evenly spaced wooden slats, creating a pergola-style canopy that allows partial sunlight to filter through. Decorative latticework runs along the front and sides beneath the beams, adding both visual interest and partial shade. The base is a flat concrete platform, suggesting installation in a patio, garden, or urban park setting. The overall design is utilitarian yet aesthetically pleasing, blending natural wood with industrial concrete for a modern outdoor shelter.
description: A pergola-style wooden awning with a slatted canopy, decorative latticework, and a concrete base, anchored to a solid wall and supported by two front posts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden beams, latticework, and both supporting posts, with the concrete base and wall clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the wooden beams, the thickness of the concrete wall, and the open structure beneath the canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the solid concrete wall, with only the ends of the wooden beams visible above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the beams, the open space beneath, and the supporting post on the right.
attribute_mounting_location: wall-mounted above a concrete platform, anchored to a vertical wall with front posts on the ground
attribute_canopy_pattern: open slatted wood beams with a diagonal lattice pattern beneath
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edges with decorative latticework along the front and sides
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with vertical posts and horizontal beams anchored to a wall
